properties.name: repost.client.enabled
properties.description: Whether Repost runtime auto-configuration is enabled. Accepts exactly lowercase true or false.

properties.name: repost.client.api-key
properties.description: Optional fixed Repost API key. Prefer a secret-backed ApiKeyProvider for rotating credentials.

properties.name: repost.client.base-uri
properties.description: Raw ASCII Repost base URI. Falls back to REPOST_API_URL and then https://api.repost.sh.

properties.name: repost.client.connect-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout using a positive integer followed by ms, s, or m.

properties.name: repost.client.attempt-timeout
properties.description: Per-attempt timeout using a positive integer followed by ms, s, or m.

properties.name: repost.client.operation-timeout
properties.description: Whole-operation timeout using a positive integer followed by ms, s, or m.

properties.name: repost.client.max-buffered-bytes
properties.description: Shared byte budget from 4MiB through 1GiB using B, KiB, MiB, or GiB.

properties.name: repost.client.retry-base-delay
properties.description: Initial retry delay using a positive integer followed by ms, s, or m.

properties.name: repost.client.retry-max-delay
properties.description: Maximum retry delay using a positive integer followed by ms, s, or m.

properties.name: repost.client.observability.micrometer-enabled
properties.description: Micrometer auto-wiring switch. Omit for automatic detection or use exactly lowercase true or false.

properties.name: repost.client.observability.opentelemetry-enabled
properties.description: OpenTelemetry auto-wiring switch. Omit for automatic detection or use exactly lowercase true or false.
